U

unregister(Context) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryObserver
Unregister the observer and stop monitoring accessory state change events.
unregister(Context) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService.AbstractAccessoryStartObserver
Unregister the observer and stop monitoring accessory ready state change events.
unregister(Context) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.config.ConfigService.AbstractConfigChangeObserver
Requests to unregister the observer to stop monitoring events of the change of configuration.
unregister(Context) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.device.events.DeviceEventsService.AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver
Unregister the observer and stop monitoring state when device event changes.
unregister(Context) - Method in interface com.hp.workpath.api.ILetObserver
Unregisters the observer to stop monitoring events.
unregister(Context) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
Requests to unregister the observer to stop monitoring and receiving the events of the job.
unregister(Context) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.MassStorageService.AbstractMassStorageChangeObserver
Requests to unregister the observer to stop monitoring events of the change of massstorage status.
unregister(Context) - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.StatisticsService.AbstractStatisticsNotificationObserver
Unregister the observer and stop monitoring state when statistics data is changed.
UsbBuilder(String) - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.UsbBuilder
Construct a new Builder for scanning to the specified USB location with default attributes.

Color Mode = DEFAULT
Document Format = DEFAULT
Scan Size = DEFAULT
Resolution = DEFAULT

UserAuthorizationData - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
The UserAuthorizationData class represents the data required for user authorization.
UserAuthorizationData() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.UserAuthorizationData
 
UserAuthorizationResult - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
The UserAuthorizationResult class represents the result of the user authorization process.
UserAuthorizationResult.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
Builder class for UserAuthorizationResult.
userDomain - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AuthenticatedUserInfo
 
userName - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AuthenticatedUserInfo
 
UserOverrides - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
The UserOverrides class holds the user's override settings for various fields such as email addresses, subject, message, and fax details.
UserOverrides.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
Builder class for UserOverrides.
UserOverridesAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
Holder for the user's overrides
UserOverridesAttributes.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
Builder for building user's override parameters.
UserPreferencesAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
Holder for the user's preferences
UserPreferencesAttributes.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.access
Builder for building user's preferences.
userPrincipalName - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AuthenticatedUserInfo
